mechanics.excerpt: These kind of rolls are called Opposed Action Checks because they are directly opposed another character: To determine success in this case_ both char acters make Action Checks with the usual modi fiers and 50 forth; Then compare their Margins of Untralned SkIII Use Standard skill: roll 3010, use worst Difficult skill: roll 4010, use worst Apply modifiers for both Link Attributes: TN Modller 2-3 4-6 7-9 Difficulty modifiers do not apply the TN derived from the target's Attributes 17
